title: IndiGo shares jump 11% as U.S.-Iran ceasefire is likely to ease India’s aviation sector woes
summary_full: IndiGo shares rose 11% as the U.S.–Iran ceasefire could ease pressure on India's aviation sector, which has been grappling with high operational costs.
summary_public: IndiGo shares rose 11% as the U.S.–Iran ceasefire could ease pressure on India's aviation sector, which has been grappling with high operational costs.

IR.label: neutral
